description: Fundamental laws of motion: net force, acceleration, weight, and friction based on Newton's principles.

variable_sub.name: Net Force
variable_sub.description: Total force acting on an object (can be negative to show direction).

variable_sub.name: Mass
variable_sub.description: The amount of matter in an object (always positive).

variable_sub.name: Acceleration
variable_sub.description: Rate of change of velocity (same direction as net force).

variable_sub.name: Weight
variable_sub.description: The force of gravity acting on an object's mass.

variable_sub.name: Friction Force
variable_sub.description: The force resisting motion between two surfaces.

variable_sub.name: Coeff. of Friction
variable_sub.description: Ratio between friction force and normal force (dimensionless).
